name: mathlib-ml-arch
description: Stops ML architecture reviews from laundering engineering guesses into fake math support.

interface.shortDescription: Audit ML architecture claims with formal support boundaries
interface.longDescription: Separates verified mathlib support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps; ships root-level CLI entrypoints, shared proofs bootstrapping with auto-repair for partial workspaces, and direct artifact validation without depending on hooks.
defaultPrompt: Run the explicit demo review flow and emit report.md plus evidence.json
Check whether the plugin is configured and guide the user through shared setup for search or verification
Bootstrap or repair the shared proofs project for this workspace and verify the Lean setup
Audit this ML architecture for role mixing and hidden assumption leaks
Generate report.md and evidence.json for the current architecture review
Recheck the current architecture audit and tighten unsupported claims
Normalize this scalar formula into EML artifacts and surface side conditions
Write ProofScratch.lean for this EML normalization attempt and report whether Lean verified it
